reference: Hi, I am Nityanand. I have been experiencing pain in the upper right side of my abdomen and in the back in the same region for about two months. I have been diagnosed with fatty liver. I have been chewing tobacco with pan masala for quite some time. Is it in any way connected with fatty liver? Please help me.
text: Hi, I am Nitinand. I have been experiencing pain in the upper right side of my abdomen and in the back in the same region for about two months. I have been diagnosed with fatty liver. I have been chewing tobacco with Panmussala for quite a while. Is it in any way connected with fatty liver? Please help me.
